pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the spiritual retreat center and mystery school with quick access to core actions and featured offerings.
primary_functions: Introduce retreats, mystery school courses, mentoring, events, and shop offerings.
Provide prominent entry points to book retreats, design a custom retreat, browse courses, and book mentoring.
Show highlighted upcoming retreats, courses, and community events with links to their listing pages.
Offer global search or quick links that lead into key filtered listing pages (retreats, courses, events).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary 'Explore Retreats' CTA or retreats section link
Click on a featured retreat card in the highlights section
Click 'Mystery School' or featured courses section link
Click on a featured course card
Click 'Events' CTA or featured events section link
Click on a featured event card
Click 'Design Your Retreat' CTA
Click '1:1 Mentoring' CTA
Click 'Shop' CTA in hero or highlights
Click 'Listen Now' or 'Meditation Library' CTA

access_methods.description: Main 'Home' navigation entry
Default landing page at site root or index.html

pages.name: Retreats Listing
pages.description: Browse and filter all scheduled retreats with rich filtering to support budget, duration, room, and meal preferences.
primary_functions: Display a list/grid of retreat cards with key details (type, dates, duration, price, room/meals icons).
Filter retreats by retreat type (e.g., meditation), date range, duration, room type, meals, and price.
Sort retreat results by price, rating, or date (including 'Price: Low to High').
Open a selected retreat’s detail page for full information and booking.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial retreat type filter (e.g., 'meditation') applied when loading the listing.
Optional ISO date string for initial start of date range filter.
Optional ISO date string for initial end of date range filter.
Optional initial duration filter in days (e.g., 3).
Optional initial room type filter (e.g., 'standard_private_room').
Optional initial meal plan filter (e.g., 'vegetarian').
Optional initial sort key (e.g., 'price').
Optional initial sort direction (e.g., 'asc' for Price: Low to High).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a retreat card in the listing grid

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Retreats' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Retreats' footer link
Supports deep linking with initial filters via query parameters

pages.name: Retreat Detail
pages.description: Detailed information for a single retreat session with configurable booking options and price quoting.
primary_functions: Show full retreat information: description, schedule, inclusions, room/meals options, and pricing by configuration.
Allow selection of stay dates within available date ranges, stay duration (e.g., 3 days), room type, and meal preferences.
Calculate and display updated price based on selected options.
Provide a 'Book Now' flow to collect name, email, phone and confirm a retreat reservation with a 'Confirm Booking (No Payment Yet)' action.

incoming_params.description: ID of the RetreatSession to display and book.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all retreats' link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a retreatSessionId is provided in the URL query
Linked from retreat listing, homepage highlights, or related events

pages.name: Custom Retreat Builder
pages.description: Interactive multi-step builder used to design a personalized retreat stay and add optional workshops.
primary_functions: Let users set retreat length (e.g., 5 days) and choose a start date, auto-calculating the date range.
Offer room type selection including a mid-range option (e.g., standard private room).
Provide an 'Add Workshops' section with filters (including price max) to show only workshops under a chosen amount.
Allow adding/removing workshops (including Sound Healing) and show them in an add-ons summary panel.
Display a retreat summary with dates, room type, and selected workshops, then collect name and email to save/confirm the custom package.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected retreat length in days.
Optional ISO start date prefilled when entering the builder.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Or browse scheduled retreats instead' link

access_methods.description: Accessible from 'Custom Retreat' header navigation link
CTA on homepage to design a personalized retreat
Optional deep links with preselected length or start date

pages.name: Courses Listing
pages.description: Browse, filter, and sort mystery school courses, including online and in-person options.
primary_functions: Display a list/grid of course cards with title, level, price, rating, start dates, and key features.
Filter courses by level (e.g., Beginner), start date range, price (with max budget), and features (e.g., includes live Q&A sessions).
Sort course results by rating, price, or start date (including 'Rating: High to Low').
Open a selected course’s detail page to see full curriculum and enroll.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial course level filter (e.g., 'beginner').
Optional minimum course start date (ISO) to prefill the date filter.
Optional maximum course start date (ISO) to prefill the date filter.
Optional maximum base_price filter (e.g., 300).
Optional flag to preselect 'Includes live Q&A sessions' feature filter.
Optional initial sort key (e.g., 'rating').
Optional initial sort direction (e.g., 'desc' for Rating: High to Low).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a course card in the listing grid

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Mystery School' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Mystery School' footer link
Supports deep linking with level, price, and date filters

pages.name: Course Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single mystery school course with tiered enrollment options.
primary_functions: Show detailed course info: description, syllabus, level, dates, delivery format, rating, and price tiers.
Highlight included features such as live Q&A sessions if applicable.
Allow users to select an enrollment tier, including a clearly marked standard/lowest-priced option.
Provide an 'Enroll Now' flow to collect name and email and confirm enrollment with a 'Complete Enrollment' or similar action.

incoming_params.description: ID of the course to display and enroll in.
Optional preselected CourseTier ID; if omitted, default/standard tier is highlighted.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all courses' link

access_methods.description: Accessed when courseId is provided in the URL query
Linked from courses listing or homepage featured courses

pages.name: Mentors Listing
pages.description: Browse available mentors, filter by rate and session length, and jump into detailed mentor profiles.
primary_functions: Display mentor cards showing name, photo, key specialties, headline rate, and available session lengths.
Filter mentors by session length (e.g., 60 minutes) and maximum price.
Support opening mentor profiles in new tabs or windows by clicking names or images.
Provide links from each mentor card to the corresponding mentor detail page for deeper information and booking.

incoming_params.description: Optional session length in minutes to prefilter mentors (e.g., 60).
Optional maximum rate filter for headline_rate (e.g., 120).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on mentor name or photo to open profile

access_methods.description: Accessible via '1:1 Mentoring' header navigation link
Accessible via '1:1 Mentoring' footer link
Supports deep linking with initial filter values

pages.name: Mentor Detail
pages.description: In-depth mentor profile with experience summary and scheduling interface for 1:1 sessions.
primary_functions: Show mentor bio, specialties, certifications, and an explicit 'Experience' section including years of teaching/practice.
List available services and session options, including a 60-minute session with pricing.
Provide a scheduling interface to pick a date and time slot (e.g., next Friday between 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm).
Collect name and email and confirm a booked session via a 'Book Session' or 'Confirm Appointment' button and final confirmation.

incoming_params.description: ID of the mentor whose profile and services are displayed.
Optional mentor service ID to preselect a specific session option (e.g., 60-minute session).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to mentors' link

access_methods.description: Accessed with mentorId (and optional serviceId) in the URL query
Opened from mentors listing, often in a new tab

pages.name: Shop Listing
pages.description: Online shop overview with category navigation and filters for spiritual products.
primary_functions: Display product listings organized by category (e.g., Meditation Gear, Journals, Incense & Scents).
Allow users to select a category from a sidebar or tabs to view relevant products.
Provide filters such as maximum price and minimum rating (e.g., 4+ stars).
Open individual product detail pages from product cards for more information and purchase options.

incoming_params.description: Product category to show initially (e.g., 'meditation_gear', 'journals', 'incense_scents').
Optional initial maximum price filter.
Optional initial minimum rating filter (e.g., 4).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card within a category
Click 'Cart' icon in shop header

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shop' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Shop' footer link
Supports deep linking into a specific product category with filters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single product with variant selection and add-to-cart controls.
primary_functions: Show full product information: images, description, price, rating, and available variants (e.g., color, size, cover design).
Allow users to select options (such as color/size for cushions or page style for journals) and adjust quantity.
Validate that price and options meet the user’s expectations (e.g., cushion under $60, journal under $25).
Add the configured product to the shopping cart via an 'Add to Cart' button.

incoming_params.description: ID of the Product to display and add to cart.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' link after adding a product
Click 'Back to category' link

access_methods.description: Accessed when productId is present in the URL query
Linked from shop listing or homepage/shop highlights

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart overview where users can review and adjust items before checkout or leaving the site.
primary_functions: Display all items in the cart with key details (name, category, options, quantity, price).
Allow users to adjust quantities or remove items if needed.
Show subtotal and any applicable tax/shipping estimates (if implemented).
Serve as the landing page when users click 'Cart' or 'View Cart' from the header after adding items.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue Shopping' link
Click on a cart item name to view its product detail

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Cart' header navigation link
Redirected to after clicking 'View Cart' from product pages

pages.name: Events Listing
pages.description: Browse the events calendar and list of upcoming community gatherings, workshops, and ceremonies.
primary_functions: Display events in a monthly calendar and/or list format with date, time, type, and spots remaining.
Allow users to change the visible month using a month selector.
Provide filters for event type (e.g., Community Circle) and price (including a 'Free' option).
Open individual event detail pages for full information and registration/RSVP.

incoming_params.description: Optional month identifier (e.g., '2026-03') for which to display events by default.
Optional initial event type filter (e.g., 'community' or 'community_circle').
Optional initial price_type filter (e.g., 'free').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event in the calendar or list view

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Events' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Events Calendar' footer link
Supports deep linking into a specific month and event filters

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and RSVP/registration form for a specific event.
primary_functions: Show event details: description, date, weekday, start time, location/online info, and number of spots left.
Confirm that the event matches user needs (e.g., free, weekday evening, more than 20 spots left).
Provide a registration/RSVP form to collect attendee name, email, and number of attendees.
Allow selection of communication preferences (e.g., SMS reminder) and submit the registration.

incoming_params.description: ID of the Event to display and register for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to events calendar' link

access_methods.description: Accessed with eventId in the URL query
Linked from events listing or homepage featured events

pages.name: Library
pages.description: Media library for guided meditations, talks, and other resources, including playlist creation and management.
primary_functions: List audio and other resources with filters for content type (e.g., Audio), category/tag (e.g., Sleep/Rest), duration range, and minimum rating.
Display filtered guided meditations with titles, durations, and ratings.
Open a selected item's detail panel or inline view to see more info and access 'Add to Playlist' actions.
Allow users to create a new playlist (e.g., 'Bedtime Practice') or add items to an existing playlist.
Provide access to a 'My Playlists' section linking to playlist detail pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial content type filter (e.g., 'audio').
Optional category such as 'sleep' or 'rest' to prefilter items.
Optional minimum duration in minutes.
Optional maximum duration in minutes.
Optional minimum rating filter (e.g., 4.5).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a playlist entry in 'My Playlists'

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Library' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Library' footer link
Supports deep links into filtered library views (e.g., sleep audios)

pages.name: Playlist Detail
pages.description: Focused view of a single user playlist such as 'Bedtime Practice', with items and playback order.
primary_functions: Display the playlist title and list all included items with duration and rating.
Allow users to verify that a playlist (e.g., 'Bedtime Practice') contains exactly the desired items.
Optionally support reordering or removing items from the playlist.
Provide playback controls to start the playlist or play individual meditations.

incoming_params.description: ID of the playlist to view and manage.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Library' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via playlistId in the URL query
Linked from the library 'My Playlists' section

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Self-service help center with searchable FAQs organized by topic, including accessibility and dietary information.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar to search FAQs by keyword (e.g., 'wheelchair').
Display search results and allow users to expand questions to reveal detailed answers.
Organize FAQs into categories including accessibility and dietary options if available.
Offer a clear 'Contact Us' or 'Still need help?' button linking to the contact form for further inquiries.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial search query to prefill the FAQ search bar.
Optional FAQ category to preselect (e.g., 'accessibility').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Still need help?' button from an accessibility-related FAQ

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'FAQ' footer link
Linked from contextual help or support prompts across the site
Supports deep links that prefill FAQ search or category filters

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form page for questions, including accessibility and dietary needs, bookings, and general inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form with fields for name, email, optional phone number, and message text.
Offer a topic/reason dropdown including an option like 'Accessibility & Dietary Needs'.
Allow users to specify a preferred contact method (e.g., phone call).
Submit inquiries, such as questions about wheelchair accessibility and dairy-free meal options during retreats.

incoming_params.description: Optional topic key (e.g., 'accessibility_dietary_needs') used to preselect the contact reason.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View FAQs' link from the contact page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer link
Accessed via 'Contact Us' buttons from FAQs or other pages
Topic parameter allows deep linking into a preselected contact topic

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the center, its mission, values, teachers, and core offerings.
primary_functions: Present the mission, values, and history of the retreat center and mystery school.
Introduce key teachers, mentors, and facilitators with brief bios.
Explain the types of retreats, courses, and services offered with links to the relevant listing pages.
Reassure visitors by highlighting location, setting, and general accessibility/philosophy.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Explore retreats' link in retreats overview section
Click 'View mystery school courses' link
Click 'Meet our mentors' link
Click 'Community events calendar' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' header navigation link
Accessible via 'About' footer link
Linked from external sites or search results directly to about.html

footer_links.description: Learn about our mission, teachers, and center
Get in touch via our contact form
